prestazioni: Engine: 13B-MSP (RENESIS) rotary engine with Mazdaspeed Performance Intake Manifold (P/N: 0000-01-4110) and custom ported peripheral exhaust ports to reduce backpressure, paired with a Racing Beat 4-1 Stainless Steel Header (P/N: 11001) for optimized scavenging at 9,500 RPM redline.

Forced Induction: Garrett GT2860R-5 turbocharger (P/N: 743347-5001S) with a custom-built intercooler setup using a GReddy Type-S Intercooler Core (P/N: 12001001) and custom 3-inch aluminum piping, tuned via Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with rotary-specific fuel and ignition maps for 300+ HP at 12 PSI boost.

Suspension & Handling: Ohlins Road & Track DFV Coilovers (P/N: DFV 001) with custom valving for the RX-8’s 52:48 weight distribution, paired with Cusco Type RS 22mm Front and 19mm Rear Adjustable Sway Bars (P/N: 606 312 A/B) and Whiteline Rear Subframe Bushings (P/N: W51210) to eliminate chassis flex under high-G cornering.
estetica: Aero: Veilside Fortune 03 Widebody Conversion Kit (P/N: VS-FORTUNE-03-RX8) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, paired with a Rocket Bunny V2 Rear Wing (P/N: PB-RX8-1000) and custom front splitter using a Seibon Carbon Fiber Hood (P/N: CF-MZ-8100-H) with integrated NACA ducts for brake cooling.

Wheels & Stance: Work Emotion CR Kiwami 19x9.5 +15 Front and 19x10.5 +25 Rear (P/N: CRK1995F15/CK19105R25) with Toyo R888R 255/35/19 and 285/30/19 tires, paired with BC Racing BR Series Coilovers (P/N: BR-RX8) for a 1.5-inch drop with aggressive camber settings (-3.5° front, -2.8° rear).

Interior & Details: Bride Zeta III Racing Seats (P/N: Z3-RX8) with custom red Alcantara inserts, paired with a Nardi Classic 350mm Steering Wheel (P/N: 1202.350.12) and a Mazdaspeed Shift Knob (P/N: 0000-01-4115) for the 6-speed manual. Full interior stripped and seam-welded with a custom 8-point roll cage by Hard Dog Motorsports (P/N: HD-RX8-8PT).
